series_metadata.series_description: The Santos Reimbursement Information documents are needed for Santos v. BWC reimbursement including settlement correspondence, claimant information verification and court ordered repayment documents. The Santos Reimbursement Information is scanned into a secure online repository. The secured online repository is an imaging concept that stores any type of electronic file, such as Microsoft Office documents, Adobe Acrobat, audio/video, Computer Aided Design (CAD), etc. as well as scanned images.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan Santos Reimbursement Information into a secure online repository, keep subrogation Case Tracker ; Electronic: Maintain in a secure online repository, keep subrogation database subrogation file has closed
